summary: domains available-bulk (POST /v1/domains/available) and dnssecRecords PATCH now unmarshal stdin into []any and send a JSON array, matching GoDaddy's array request-body contract instead of forcing map[string]any.
reason: Repo-wide body-shape sweep (same class as the earlier DNS records []DNSRecord fix): these two endpoints take JSON arrays per GoDaddy's API, but the generated code forced map[string]any, so piping the correct array body failed with 'cannot unmarshal array into Go value of type map'. The commands were effectively unusable for their real contract.
